pages.title: EV Charging Solutions | Shell USA, Inc.
pages.description: Shell Recharge offers a reliable public electric vehicle charging network of over 4,000 stations nationwide. Use the Shell App for live availability. Find out more!, Shell Recharge offers a reliable public electric vehicle charging network of over 4,000 stations nationwide. Use the Shell App for live availability. Find out more!
pages.content:
[Skip to main content](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging.html#main)

![The Shell App is Electrifying](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging/_jcr_content/root/main/section_copy_copy/item.shellimg.jpeg/1765319202784/girl-at-shell-recharge-station.jpeg?imdensity=1&imwidth=1118&impolicy=amidala-image)

# Charge on the go with Shell Recharge

Drive an electric vehicle (EV)? Shell Recharge is a fast and reliable1 public charging network. Find the nearest EV charging station with the Shell App.

[Download the Shell App](https://www.shell.us/rewards-and-savings/shell-app.html)

## Our Network

![Women checking her vehicle charging status](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging/_jcr_content/root/main/section_1355156573/promo.shellimg.png/1765397377739/recharge-forecourt-promo.png?imdensity=1&imwidth=509&impolicy=amidala-image)

### Find a charger near you

Our network offers fast and reliable charging at select Shell gas stations and Shell Recharge Hubs.1 We also have more than 115,000 charge points in the Shell Recharge roaming network. Find a charger near you!

[Find a charger](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging/find-an-ev-charging-station.html)

## Find a charging station with the Shell App

### Fast charging stations

With speeds up to 360 kW, our fast and reliable charging network is available right at your fingertips.1

### Live availability

Avoid surprises with real-time charging station availability in the app.

### Start and stop charging sessions

Start and stop charging sessions directly in the app.

### Monitor Status

View the status of your charging session in the app.

### Multiple ways to pay

Pay for your charging session directly through the app using a variety of payment methods.

### Charging history

View and manage all your charging sessions in the app.

## How to charge with the Shell App

### Step 1: Get started with the Shell App

When you log into the Shell App, select “EV Driver.” Follow the in-app prompts to locate the nearest Shell Recharge station. Shell Recharge offers charging speeds up to 360 kW.1

### Step 2: Plug in and charge

Once you arrive at the Shell Recharge station, make sure your vehicle is ready to begin charging Select “Charge” in the app. Choose a connector via the app, confirm payment details and plug the connector into your vehicle.

### Step 3: Pay and Go

When you finish charging, select “Stop Charging” and disconnect the plug from your vehicle. You’re ready to go! Find your receipt in the Shell App.

## Shell Recharge resources

[Shell Recharge FAQs](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging/shell-app-ev-faqs.html)

[Shell Recharge Hubs](https://www.shell.us/electric-vehicle-charging/hubs.html)

1 Shell measures reliability on charger "up-time," defined as charging point signaling as on or in-use. Shell does not account for network issues or delivery of electricity to network. Shell cannot account for vehicle acceptance of charging session. Shell Recharge offers charging speeds up to 360 kW. Charging results may vary; no guarantees provided. Charging speed depends on several factors including temperature outside, type of car, size of battery and battery condition. Please check with your vehicle manufacturer for compatibility and further information.

# Shell plc first quarter 2026 results announcement

Our first quarter results and first quarter interim dividend announcement for 2026.

[Read more](https://www.shell.com/investors/results-and-reporting/quarterly-results.html)

[![Shell announces agreement to acquire Canadian energy company ARC Resources Ltd.](https://www.shell.com/_jcr_content/root/main/section_636362255/simple/promo_1962010312_cop_866737710.shellimg.jpeg/1778060306494/gold-creek-aerial-promo.jpeg?imdensity=1&imwidth=392&impolicy=amidala-image)\\
\\
**Shell announces agreement to acquire Canadian energy company ARC Resources Ltd.** \\
\\
Shell plc has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire ARC Resources Ltd. (TSX: ARX), an energy company focused on the Montney shale basin in British Columbia and Alberta, Canada.\\
\\
Read more](https://www.shell.com/news-and-insights/newsroom/news-and-media-releases/2026/shell-announces-agreement-to-acquire-canadian-energy-company-arc-resources.html)

[![](https://www.shell.com/news-and-insights/scenarios/the-2026-energy-security-scenarios/_jcr_content/root/metadata.shellimg.jpeg/1767064506539/promo-2026-energy-security-scenarios.jpeg?imdensity=1&imwidth=392&impolicy=amidala-image)\\
\\
**Shell’s 2026 Energy Security Scenarios** \\
\\
Explore the challenges to the transition: what will define the energy future, how nations can navigate a changing world, and how the world can power an AI revolution.\\
\\
Read more](https://www.shell.com/news-and-insights/scenarios/the-2026-energy-security-scenarios.html)
